name: native-runtime
mission: Tighten the Phase 3 backend lifecycle contract. Improve the orchestrator and native runner so native session/runtime metadata is more explicit, native scheduling mode is visible, and forum-side scheduling is clearly treated as a compatibility layer driving native turns rather than an opaque black box.
extraInstructions: Prefer additive metadata and clearer lifecycle signals over risky architectural rewrites.
Keep OpenClaw turns bound to the intended local runtime/workspace and make that obvious in code or metadata.
Do not modify frontend files in this subtask.

text: [x] Inspect current orchestrator/native-runner flow and identify additive metadata points for native lifecycle, scheduling ...
[ ] Implement backend changes in owned files to expose explicit native runtime metadata, compatibility-layer scheduling sig...
[ ] Run targeted verification, review diff for owned files, and summarize residual risks
